programmes.show_description: Ta Manue agus Johanna curtha den chas agus socraionn David Levy an choir a athchruthu. (With Manue and Johanna off the case, David Levy orders a reconstruction.)
Suil siar sa ar na hagallaimh, taibhleirithe agus gearrscannain on sraith Imeall. (A look back at interviews, performances, and short film pieces from the series Imeall.)
Morimeachtai an lae o Aonad Nuachta TG4. (The day's main news stories from a regional, national and international perspective.)
Ceol agus comhluadar i measc lucht na gcaipini i gCeann Tra agus i nDun Chaoin. (Music & chat from our friends in Ceann Tra and Dun Chaoin. Presented by Breanndan O Beaglaoich.)
Tugann Doireann Ni Ghlacain aghaidh ar dheisceart Bhaile Atha Cliath sa gclar seo. (In this programme Doireann Ni Ghlacain travels to South Dublin.)
Caineal nuachta 24 uair an chloig na Fraince ata i France 24. (FRANCE 24 is France's 24 hour international news channel.)
Nil aon easpa claracha do dhaoine oga ar Cula4 - bi ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in eineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cula4 - watch, play and learn.)
Ba mhaith le Ribin dul ag ceol in eineacht le Rocco ach nil aon cheol aici. (Ribin wants to play music with Rocco but she has a problem, her music is awful.)
Caithfidh an Meicneoir Gorm teacht i gcabhair ar Eric an Tochaltoir. Ta Gecko sainnithe i dtollan. (The Blue Mechanic must save Eric the Excavator. Gecko gets stuck in a tunnel.)
Bionn Cory faoi bhru nuair a theann na Carsons chuig an gcuirt bhabhlala. (Cory feels under pressure when the Carsons pay a trip to the bowling alley.)
Ta seo tallainne ar siul i gClos na mBalun ach nil a fhios ag Pip cen tallann ata aigesean. (It's Talent Show Day in Balloon Barnyard, but Pip isn't sure what to do.)
Tagann an Maor Nat ar einin na gcos mor nuair a bhionn se amuigh ag siul. (Ranger Nat comes across the Big-Footed Cave Bird while hiking.)
Is cosuil go bhfuil an cairrin ata Lloyd a thastail ag cailleadh cumhachta. (Lloyd's testing a wind-up powered go-cart, but a problem arises when it keeps running out of energy.)
Faigheann Gekko cumhachtai breise. (Gekko's powers are increased by the Power Pondweeds Romeo was after in an underwater mission.)
Ta Finny leis an oiche a chaitheamh tigh Mhuirinn den chead uair. (It's Finny's first sleepover and she is so nervous.)
Ta an diabhal ar Igam Ogam ag laimhseail rudai. (Igam Ogam can't resist touching things.)
Deanann Pinocchio margadh le Luidin O Laoi nach bhfasfaidh a shron ma insionn se breag. (Pinocchio makes a deal with Luidin O Laoi that his nose won't grow if he lies.)
Tugann Gepetto jab do Pinocchio, ach an feidir leis brath air an jab a dheanamh ceart? (Gepetto gives Pinocchio a job, but can he count on him to complete it?)
Nil aon easpa claracha do dhaoine oga ar Cula4 - bi ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in eineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cula4 - watch, play and learn.)
Nil aon duine ann le spraoi le Lola o tharla go bhfuil slaghdan ar Lotta. (Lotta has caught a cold, so Lola has no one to play with.)
Deir tuismitheoiri Charlie agus Lola leo a seomra a ghlanadh. (Charlie and Lola's parents tell them to clean their room.)
Is maith le Lola na rudai a fheiceann si nuair a bhionn si ag faire amach a tharraingt. (Lola likes spying and observing things and then drawing them.)
Ta Lola an-togtha le cleasa draiochta nua Charlie. (Charlie has a new magic kit and Lola is very impressed by it.)
La breithe Charlie ata ann agus ta se ag iarraidh go mbeadh teama arrachta ag a choisir. (It is Charlie's birthday, and he is planning a monster themed birthday party.)
Ceannaionn Zak fearas draiodora agus feachann se le cleasa a imirt ar a chairde. (After Zak buys a magician set, he tries out a few of his tricks for his friends.)
Ta cat darb ainm Saifir ar iarraidh agus ta duais airgid le fail ag an te a aimseoidh i. (Zak and his friends come across a poster of a missing cat called Sapphire.)
Is mian le Mo a bheith ina bhall den Chlub Robataice. (Mo dreams of joining the highly selective Robotics Club.)
Socraionn Mo rudai maithe a dheanamh ag suil go laghdofar an t-achar a coinneofar istigh e. (Mo tries to reduce his detention time with good deeds.)
Ta naire ar Sam dul chuig Teaghliombo lena mathair. (Sam tries to avoid the humiliation of Familimbo with her mother.)
Beidh Alanna ag tabhairt aire da deirfiur bheag ar Inis Mor. (Alanna takes care of her baby sister on Inis Mor.)
Achoimre ar chuid de mhorscealta na seachtaine mar a craoladh ar Nuacht TG4. (Some of the stories from this week's regional news as seen on Nuacht TG4.)
Ta Blanche faoi gheasa ag saighdiuir ata tagtha abhaile o Mhurascaill na Peirse. (A soldier returning from the Persian Gulf sweeps Blanche off her feet.)
Is ag Seo Bhaile Mhoireil in Aontroim a bheifear sa gclar seo. (In this episode we get a taste of the Balmoral Show in Antrim.)
Clar trath na gceist i nGaeilge do dheagoiri! Cholaiste Marist v Scoil Mhuire Bhun Cranncha. (Irish language teen quiz show! Marist College Athlone v Scoil Mhuire Buncrana.)
Sa gclar deireanach feictear deireadh seasur amhain agus tus seasur eile. (In the final episode one season is coming to an end while another is getting geared up to begin.)
Aimsir reigiunach agus naisiunta. (National and regional weather.)
Craoladh beo ar Chluiche Ceannais Shraith Peile Allianz Roinn 2. A chur i lathair ag Micheal O Domhnaill. (Live coverage of the Allianz Football League Division 2 Final.)
Craoladh beo ar Chluiche Ceannais Shraith Peile Allianz Roinn 1. A chur i lathair ag Micheal O Domhnaill. (Live coverage of the Allianz Football League Division 1 Final.)

Is breá le Clúmh a bheith ag leanúint Bréidín i ngan fhios dó. (Fluff gets a big kick out of following Tweedy without him noticing!)
Nach deas an lá é le dul ag spaisteoireacht? (What a lovely day for a stroll!)
Téann rothaí an bhus thart is thart! Ná habair! Tá an bus caillte ag Benny an giorria! (The wheels on the bus go round and round! Oh no! Benny the hare missed the bus!)
Bíonn Buí ar bís nuair a chastar dhá dhath nua air. (Yellow is excited when he meets two new colours.)
Tá Cory agus a chairde ag iarraidh liathróid a fháil anuas den díon. (Cory and his friends try to find a way to get their ball down off the roof.)
Tá Roy dubh dóite ach cuireann Caitríona spionnadh ann lena cuid damhsa. (Roy is bored, but Caitríona is here to cheer him up with a fun and energetic dance.)
Ag foghlaim faoi champaí samhraidh a bheidh Elmo inniu. (Elmo is learning all about summer camps today.)
Ag foghlaim faoi ghrianghrafadóirí a bheidh Elmo inniu. (Elmo is learning all about photographers today.)
Tá Pip agus Posy ag iarraidh ar Frankie dul ag spraoi sa sneachta leo ach ní maith le Frankie a bheith fuar. (Pip and Posy encourage Frankie to play with them in the snow.)
Cabhróidh Diggy Piggy le Deeno fáil réidh lena chuid stuif. (Diggy Piggy helps Deeno to find a home for all the 'stuff' he has filling up his den.)
Caithfidh Owlette an fhírinne a insint sula n-inseoidh Cailín Luna do Catboy agus Gekko céard go díreach a tharla. (Owlette accidentally breaks the lens of the telescope.)
Leag Wussywat caisleán Nín trí thimpiste. (Wussywat has knocked Ird's sandcastle over by mistake.)
Caitheann Caitlín a lá breithe ag tógáil pictiúr dá cairde. (Elizabeth, Pablo and Jack plan a special surprise party for Samantha's birthday.)
Cuireann na cairde Iasc Beag i mbabhla ach níl an Cat sásta. (The pups put Little Fish in a bowl, but their friend, the Cat, has other ideas.)
Tá na Piseanna-Rex óga in ann cluiche iontach a imirt ó tharla go bhfuil an bolcán beo. (The volcano is active which means the baby Pea-Rexes get to play Pea Shooter.)
Buaileann Dot le cara nua, Sylvie, ag Seó Ealaíne na nÓg. (Dot befriends Sylvie, a talented young artist that she met at the local art show.)
Eagraíonn Ella agus an tUasal Jackson comórtas ealaíne sa ghairdín. (Ella and Mr Jackson arrange an Art Competition for the garden wall.)

Caithfidh Charlie agus Lola a spraoi féin a bheith acu fad a bhíonn a máthair ag an bhfiaclóir. (Charlie and Lola have to amuse themselves while their mother is at the dentist.)
Tá béar ag tóraíocht bia sa choill ach tá sé i gcontúirt. An mbeidh Matt agus Emma in ann teacht i gcabhair air? (Can Matt and Emma save a brown bear in the forest?)
Ceannaíonn athair Lola deilbhín di ach tá rún ag Victor agus ag Tanc é a ghoid. (Lola's Dad is going to buy his daughter a figurine, but Victor and Tanc want to steal it.)
Tá Angelo, Elena agus Daid faoi ghlas sa siopa mór. (Angelo, Dad and Elena are locked inside the department store.)
Caithfidh Dónall fón póca Mháirtín a fháil ar ais ón bpríomhoide. (Dónall has to rescue Máirtín's phone from the headmistress.)

Amhrán spraíúil faoin zú. (A fun song about let's go to the zoo.)
Tá misean tábhachtach ag na Blocuimhreacha. (When One's balloon flies away, only Step Squad can save it but what if there's more than one Step Squad?)
Dathanna geala agus dorcha a bheidh againn inniu. (Today, we find Colours that are Light or Dark.)
Tugann na Blociontais cúnamh d'Ealaí patrún a chruthú do Bhuaf. (The Wonderblocks help Arty to figure out how to make the perfect pattern for Toad.)
Téann Mama agus Pompon ar thóir taisce faoi bhun na spéire. (Mama and Pompon go on an adventure in search of treasure at the bottom of a rainbow.)
Is í Póilín Nic Géidigh a bheidh ag léamh scéal an lae inniu. (Today's story of the day is read by Póilín Nic Géidigh.)
Ní hí an chomhairle chéanna atá ag Pip ná ag Posy do Jamila faoi bheith ag sleamhnú síos an cnoc. (Pip and Posy try to teach Jamila how to sledge down the hill.)
Tá Helen ag iarraidh ar an rang an bíoma a shiúl san ionad aclaíochta. (Helen suggests the class try walking the beam in the gym.)
Eagraíonn Helen siúlóid dúlra dá cuid daltaí. (Helen organizes a nature walk for her students.)

programmes.show_name: True agus Ríocht an Bhogha Ceatha
programmes.show_description: Socraíonn Gormlaith go bhfuil sí ag iarraidh cabhrú le daoine mar a dhéanann True. (Gormlaith decides that she too wants to help people like True does.)
Samhlaíonn Isabelle an saol ina blagálaí nuair a bheidh sí mór le cúnamh ó Shióg na bPost. (Isabelle imagines her life as a Blogger when she grows up.)
Tugann Zou cúnamh do Zak a bhréagán a chuardach nuair nach mbíonn sé in ann teacht air. (Zak's cuddly toy is missing and Zou helps him find it.)
Tá Bella ag déanamh staidéar ar Tika Pila. An mbeidh Deedee in ann cúnamh a thabhairt di? (Bella is learning and studying about Tika Pila. Will Deedee be able to help her?)
Gadhar cosanta, muc atá ar strae agus lachain ag siopadóireacht a bheidh againn inniu. (Today we'll see police dogs, road hogs, sawing logs and a group of ducks going shopping.)
Achoimre ar chuid de mhórscéalta na seachtaine mar a craoladh ar Nuacht TG4. (Some of the stories from this week's regional news as seen on Nuacht TG4.)

Tá Sam agus Diane fós in árach a chéile ó bhris siad amach óna chéile. (Sam and Diane are still blaming each other for the breakdown of their relationship.)
Beidh Derek Hickey, Liz Doherty, Gerry Murphy, Francis O'Connor agus neart eile ar an gclár. (Derek Hickey, Liz Doherty, Gerry Murphy and many others feature in this programme.)
Cuardaíonn Jessica an nasc atá idir timpiste bóthair, inár maraíodh fear óg, agus dúnmharú dlíodóra. (Jessica looks for links between the two seemingly unrelated deaths.)
Tugann Doireann Ní Ghlacáin aghaidh ar Chiarraí Thuaidh sa gclár seo chun blaiseadh a fháil de cheol na háite. (Doireann Ní Ghlacáin explores North Kerry's rich musical tradition.)
Tabharfaidh Paul Murton cuairt ar na háiteanna a bhfuil baint acu le Robert Burns. (In this episode, Paul Murton visits the places connected to the life of Robert Burns.)
Beidh Trudi Lalor agus Patrick Connolly ar stáitse sa gclár seo. (Trudi Lalor and Patrick Connolly give a lively and entertaining performance on the show.)
Is lánúin óg iad Beau agus Madeline atá ag iarraidh a gcéad teach a cheannach. (Beau and Madeline are a young couple on the hunt for their first home.)
